summary:
POLITICAL AND GEOPOLITICAL CLAIMS: Brandon discusses recent statements made by Donald Trump, echoing allegations of election interference and voter fraud in multiple states, including Michigan, Arizona, and Georgia. Brandon shares his visions concerning international affairs, claiming that Iran will experience severe infrastructure damage and face a military coalition from neighboring Arab nations. Furthermore, Brandon details his belief that South Korea and Taiwan are facing imminent threats from communistic forces originating in China and North Korea, illustrating his point by presenting a testimony from Pastor Hyun-Bo Son of South Korea, who recounts facing imprisonment and governmental persecution for holding church services during the COVID pandemic. Brandon also mentions political figures like JD Vance and Marco Rubio, predicting future political shifts and expressing support for specific legislative acts such as the Save America Act and the Clarity Act.

ENVIRONMENTAL PREDICTIONS AND NATURAL DISASTERS: Brandon recounts a vision in which he heard a deep, roaring noise originating from the ocean floor, which he interprets as a harbinger of significant natural events in the Atlantic and Pacific oceans. He asserts that major, record-breaking earthquakes and tectonic plate shifts are imminent, specifically warning that areas such as Portland, Seattle, British Columbia, and Japan will experience severe seismic activity. Additionally, Brandon claims that unusual environmental phenomena, such as freshwater lakes suddenly rising to 92 degrees Fahrenheit, toxic blue algae blooms, and dying fish, will serve as observable signs of these impending geological shifts. He encourages his listeners to remain calm and rely on their faith for protection during these future events.

SPIRITUAL WARFARE AND DOMESTIC PROTECTION: Brandon addresses listeners who feel they are experiencing spiritual or demonic torment in their homes, advising them to combat these feelings by anointing their houses, windows, and doors with oil to represent divine protection. He attributes various negative experiences, such as paranoia, fear, and marital issues, to demonic influences, sharing a specific personal vision in which he claims Supreme Court Justice Amy Coney Barrett is suffering from severe paranoia and marital distress due to spiritual attacks. Brandon strongly warns against engaging with secular media and practices that he believes invite demonic entities, specifically denouncing horror films, Harry Potter, Ouija boards, and tarot cards. He emphasizes that believers must actively reject these influences and maintain strict adherence to spiritual purity to safeguard their households. PERSONAL FAITH AND HEALING NARRATIVES: Brandon shares deeply personal stories regarding his family's experiences with faith-based healing and financial practices. He discusses his daughter Megan's medical diagnoses, including autism, and describes his steadfast refusal to accept the doctors' prognoses, choosing instead to rely on his religious beliefs for her eventual healing and development. Brandon characterizes himself as an unwavering believer who prioritizes spiritual promises over medical consensus, acknowledging the difficulty of his daily challenges while maintaining his religious convictions. Additionally, he recounts his personal transition from being reluctant to tithe to becoming an enthusiastic financial giver, claiming that his commitment to church donations ultimately brought spiritual and personal fulfillment to his household.
rawData: [July 17, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7I5xdRDaayo]-[Well, good evening, family. Thank you for joining me again tonight. Did you all watch President Trump? We were watching President Trump, or I would have been on a little earlier. I wanted to hear what he had to say. And as we all expected, a lot of voter fraud in 2020. And so, you know, all the fact checkers that were there and all the stuff that happened all during that time frame and Facebook always fact-check, fact-check. So, I guess it's true, you know, for what he says that they're releasing on whitehouse.gov. They're releasing the information about the voter fraud and China interfering with our elections and so on and so on and so on. Major things in Michigan, he said. I was hoping he would say Minnesota because we've been praying over Minnesota and over Atlanta because of the voter fraud that I've seen, and then I've seen it in Arizona when Kari Lake was running and trying to win her area. I saw a lot of fraud there and in Nevada, and of course we know in California. But there's a lot of information that he said that they had that when Obama had bags of information they were trying to burn and they didn't burn it, and there was all kinds of stuff he said in that. So I, you know, go watch it. I think it's interesting where we are with 'Too Big to Rig.' I believe in 2024 it was too big to rig where they tried, but there's just too many people that voted for Trump. And then where will we be in the next three months? And that's where we are praying for key states concerning Florida, concerning Georgia, concerning—I mean, go on and on and on. We can pray all night about those. But I just think it's interesting because it's what I'm getting in the spirit, especially concerning Georgia and whenever he brought up even in articles saying that Georgia had a lot of voter fraud and things and about the two Senate seats. And so we have work to do. You know, and just continue to pray for the Save America Act to pass and that they would do this, but not only Save America, but the Clarity Act for the finances, for crypto, for all the things that need to be passed. And so, I guess Braden has some things tonight for you that he found on the news that he said that he thinks that you all would think was entertaining for this little bit of time. And so then we'll go and we'll pray. But I want to say this. I forgot about this last time. Not last time, but the time before and then I took two days off. Deep calls unto deep. And I heard in the spirit deep water out in the ocean. There's going to be the waves roaring. But it was something in the depth of the earth in the ocean. As we were praying, I could hear the groaning of the earth, but it sounded like a roar. And the Lord said, 'This is coming. This is coming. It will be a sign.' Not whenever you hear waves coming that are massive waves and it sounds like, you know, when you hear a hurricane, and this was something that was in the depth of the water, deep in the water, and it was so loud that you could hear it on the beach from way out in the deep. And I saw volcanoes going off, but I saw the earth in travail as labor pains upon a woman. And so I think it's interesting as I was seeing that, a major noise is what I was hearing in the Atlantic and the Pacific, deep water, deep calls unto deep. And the Lord brought it up to me again today to be watchful—you're going to see this. You're going to hear about it. It's going to be in the news soon. You're going to hear about noises. You know, whenever everybody's talking about the sounds, it sounds like HAARP or whatever and there was like a horn blast in the sky and people were freaking out filming it and you don't know if it's real or if it's not. This is going to be in the water, and it's something about the deep water. And so I wanted to remind you of it. I just felt it was important. The other part is still what the Lord was showing us last night. Praying for Iraq, praying for the wealth transfer, praying for a new Iraqi blessing of oil wealth and all the things that are happening over there. Praying for the Iraqi people. Praying for the liberation of Iran, for the underground church to have a major move of God. As I saw that, Iran was taking their hands off of Iraq and dabbling in their affairs and their politics. There was a principality that had a hold of Iraq. I saw a pipeline being built. I saw oil wealth coming up out of the ground. I saw stability, but I heard much corruption still. But then I saw Iran going back to the Stone Age. And I want to remind you, it wasn't all of Iran. It was only parts of Iran. The infrastructure was really damaged by Israel and America, but it wasn't just America and Israel anymore. It was other Arab nations. And the Lord said an unstable Iran is dangerous to the whole area. So I saw Saudi Arabia and Kuwait and all these other people joining up to have a coalition of troops on the ground, that it wouldn't just be air strikes anymore, that I saw actually boots on the ground and freedom fighters rising up in their own communities, people that would try to arm themselves and to come against the tyrant government in the days ahead. So, we'll continue to pray. More than ever, we need a revival in Iran. We need a revival in Cuba. We need a revival. And so, President Trump has said he's going to research the drones. Now, isn't that interesting? The Lord revealed to us that there were drones given to them by Iran. And now they're talking about it in the news. And so we're praying over that. Now, this was interesting to me today. This happened back in January. And I want to play this video for you of what the Lord showed us about South Korea and China influencing the elections of South Korea to bring about a communistic dragon over South Korea. Is this what we're watching? Yeah, I believe so. Okay. So, go ahead and play this because this is where we are. As I saw, I was looking into South Korea and the Lord said it will even be challenging in the days concerning South Korea and a communist dragon will try to grab onto South Korea. But because there's more prayer root there, it will be held back. As long as my people in South Korea intercede and pray, it will hold back the communism off of their nation. As long as they humble themselves and pray. As long as they turn from their wicked ways and humble themselves, he said, 'Brandon, I will have a hedge of My protection over South Korea.' I saw it trying to infiltrate. It was Chinese-looking. It looked like a snake, a dragon coming out of China into North Korea trying to come over into—and it was a spirit. It was a bad way of thinking through their government and their politics. And he said it's trying to get a stronghold through their leaders. They don't have the right leaders. Pray for their leaders. It's an infiltration from China coming in through North Korea. It's a spirit that's trying to hook them, but they will be a major pillar in the end-time church. Revival will go out from there if they pray. But I saw Taiwan like with this golden dome on all sides if the people will pray. If they don't, they'll fall within three days. Three days. I saw they'll fight for one. I saw they'll fight into two. But by the end of the second day, it will completely fold. I saw the Chinese government using weapons that have never been used before, similar to what America did to Venezuela. They have the same capabilities of technological weaponry, maybe even better in some ways. Not every way—I believe still America's top—but there were things that China had that even America didn't have, secret things, and they would use them as a flex because these people had artillery and things to fight, but it was no match to what China would try to do. It fell in three days. It was like that. So, last night at a church—I'm not exactly sure which church—but my mother-in-law sent this to my wife today and said, "You need to see this." What you're about to see is a man who is a preacher, Pastor Hyun-Bo Son. I don't even know how to say it; I'm not even going to try. But he lives in South Korea, and I want you to hear his testimony. He said this last night at church, and I want you to hear his testimony about what's happening in South Korea right now that goes along with this word that I gave back in January and what they're going through. So go ahead. I'm Pastor Hyun-Bo Son from South Korea. My oldest son, Young, and my wife, Young-ri, are here. I'm very grateful to your congregation and Pastor Jack Hibbs. As I was imprisoned last December, Pastor Jack Hibbs and the congregation here brought Young and myself up to the stage and you guys prayed for us. Just before we got here, we were spending time with Reverend Joseph Bondarenko, a pastor who was locked up in a Soviet Union gulag underground prison for nearly 10 years. It seems like the Soviet Union and everything was a long time ago, but it's actually happening in South Korea right now. Just like how you guys fought to worship during COVID, Segero Church—our church—was the only mega-church that fought to worship, and it was closed down. Segero Church, for a fact, is almost twice the size—I mean, it's a big church—but it's twice the size of others in Korea. And the government was telling all churches to only hold five worshippers in such a big sanctuary. I said to the government that we are not an elephant circus where we are just told what to do, and I decided to reject that. All media came to our church and denounced us. The government literally wrapped a rope around the church and shut it down, and we decided to worship even outside during freezing cold times. Numerous police officers and prosecutors came to our church. However, we decided to worship until the last day. If we are the ones who just give up on freedom of religion and worship, no one will protect it, and we'll just let it go. Christians and the congregation members are the ones who have to protect the freedom of religion. COVID did end; however, I had to go through 40 hearings. The reason why he keeps cutting out like that is because we edit out his translation into South Korean for the people there. This is a translator standing next to him. He's speaking in English and it is being translated. We cut out the translation in South Korean so it wouldn't be choppy. It is still choppy, but it's saving time. So I just wanted to let you know. Go ahead. The end. However, I had to go through 40 hearings until just two months ago for six years. It would be just like one day I would go to the police office to get investigated, the next day going to a prosecution's office, and the next day going to the courthouse to go through a hearing. The Democratic Party has won the election and they have proposed and are trying to pass the LGBT law in Korea. The current regime, which promotes communism, is also proposing a law to shut down the church. Whichever church they don't like—or just like what my father said, or whatever a pastor says that they don't like—they would shut it down and transfer all the assets and properties to the government. They're also trying to shut down alternative schools that are teaching biblical values. I criticized the current government for trying to pass this law, and for the Democratic Party heavily proposing this law in the National Assembly, and I was indicted on 12 charges. The cell where I was imprisoned was a single confinement with a width of less than three feet. There is no chair, no mattress like in the US; there are only bugs. However, in my heart, sincerely and genuinely, I was so grateful and I was happy. Being able to be persecuted to glorify God and to protect freedom of worship and freedom of religion is something that I always dreamed about. Freedom of religion is not something that we just got for free. Someone has fought for it and someone has won to gain that freedom. I was so comforted when I heard the news that the Chino Hills congregation and Pastor Jack Hibbs had my son, Young, up to the stage and were praying for our church and me. In January, I was released because I was sentenced to six months, and that was the time when I was already in prison for five months. However, I'm on probation for a year. So I don't know when I will be going back to jail. The South Korean government is taking so many angles to attack me, my family, and the Segero Church. However, I'm not worried about that and not concerned at all. Look at once-free Hong Kong and how it was taken over by communism. Now consider South Korea, where pastors can't even criticize the government for anti-biblical policies and laws. This is the reality. Numerous people said nothing like this could happen in South Korea. We are given freedom of religion, freedom to worship, and freedom in general. However, we shouldn't take this for granted. Just like how South Korea lost its freedom, it can come to your door in the US. Satan is basically trying to use power to imprison pastors and to shut down and silence anyone that criticizes any policy or legislation that God doesn't like. Just because we are comfortable right now, just laying down watching TV, it's not going to help at all to protect our freedom. We are in a time of freedom and prosperity, thankfully, thanks to God. However, we shouldn't stay the same as we are right now. We have to have a fresh heart. We have to look back to our hearts and ask ourselves what we should do right now and what could be coming up in the near future. A lot of people keep silent whenever freedom is getting attacked. But whenever there's someone—starting from one person—that fights for freedom, just like Joshua fought for freedom, there will be freedom that is God-given. And I really wish and pray that Calvary Church Chino Hills and Segero Church, all of us fighting for freedom of religion and also freedom in general, will make God happy and it will be preserved. Even if I go back to Korea, I'll keep fighting against the government that is always trying to legislate anti-biblical policies and laws. I will keep fighting and I will keep praying that I continue doing so. Please keep praying for us and keep fighting alongside us as we are brothers and sisters in Christ. Thank you so much. Thank you. It touched my heart when he was talking about how he was blessed to suffer for Jesus in prison in a three-foot cell with no chair, nothing but a bunch of roaches and bugs. I thought, man, how spoiled some of us are. I took it as a prompt to examine myself when I hear about the persecution of others and what they go through. We know the people in North Korea and those concentration camps—the torture and the slave labor camps they go through when they're found out to be Christians—it is just horrendous beyond words. But my heart is to pray for the Asians. My heart is for our Asian channel; there's so many of you that are watching this right now because I'm talking to my translator, Braden, who will translate this. I just want to tell you, we're praying for you. We're going to be interceding for you. This blessed me. I don't know who this man is, but I'm sure a lot of you who watch on our South Korean channel do. I know that revival is coming to South Korea. And I believe with all my heart that a major move of God is going to shake the nations and that there will be an end-time Azusa Street in Asia, in South Korea; the waves of revival will go into China, will go into the Philippines, will go into Taiwan, to Japan, and a shaking to awaken. If you remember, you watched that video, I saw the old well of revival—that the stagnant pool of water became not stagnant anymore. And the well started to spring forth new water. And it was no longer a stagnant pool, but a fresh oasis for people to drink out of. And I saw South Korea turn into a major pool of revival. And I saw—and this is what goes back to that on the 11th—if the Lord says, 'If the people pray and come against us,' it's a spirit. We wrestle not against flesh and blood. And we know that the devil is influencing it through a dragon. I said it's a dragon that is coming through communistic China, through North Korea with a dragon. And it stemmed like a tail of a snake that went out of it and went into North Korea and was influencing Kim Jong-un, and now it's influencing your politics. But I believe if the church arises and prays, we can change this just like the Lord was saying, and it will happen the same with Taiwan. If the people of Taiwan don't pray, I saw that whole nation falling in three days. But as we kept praying—this is back in January—as we prayed back in July, I saw the Lord say, 'I will not allow them to be taken over until the Tribulation.' And then in the Tribulation, I saw them falling to China. But as we pray, we were buying more time. And it was a wall of defense, that Golden Dome. So, I thought that was interesting, and I wanted to show it to you. I believe tonight part of our prayer time will be praying for South Korea for a major move of God and for this young man to keep strong. He said he's on probation. He's expecting them to throw him back into jail, and so it's very hard. His church sounds like it's a pretty good-sized church there in South Korea. All right. Anything else, son? Not much, no. So, a pretty slow news day. There's a lot of people talking about the Clarity Act. There's a lot of people talking about Iran blowing up the bridges. There's tankers exploding. There's all kinds of craziness in Iran. And they blew up the bridge today, and so on and so on. So, you know, it's usually always on the weekends that things seem to really escalate over there. Tomorrow's Friday. And then Braden thought this was—oh, look. Listen to Karoline. She's back. Thank God. We missed her. I really think she's the best press secretary we've ever had. Go ahead. Oh, yeah. This is just the reporter's question. Go ahead. Okay, JD Vance had an interview on Joe Rogan, and a lot of people are tagging me in it on X and saying, 'Brandon, did you see what JD Vance did? It's already happening.' What did you say? 'He's turning on Trump about the Epstein list, about things.' And I saw that by midterms, going into 2027 and 2028, he would break off and try to do his own thing, and he would be—I said he's two-faced. I saw him as a fish swimming in the White House, and an Ivy League education. There have been a lot of words that I've said about JD Vance, and I said I saw Marco Rubio rise up. And I believe God has put his hand on Marco Rubio, not on JD Vance. But we'll see JD Vance become very outspoken in the days ahead. But go ahead and listen to Karoline. As far as I'm concerned, it's just a waste of time dealing with them. They're liars. There's something wrong with them. They are cuckoo. They are scum, sick people, vicious, violent people. And then Vice President Vance went on Joe Rogan last night and he said, 'I'm very frustrated by the Americans and frankly by people in other countries who say you cannot negotiate with the Iranians.' So your response to these contradictions, because I think you can understand how that's confusing for Americans with this mixed messaging. And then second question for you—and you respond. Yeah, go and respond. A point of condition in continuing these conversations with the country as well as political prisoners. I wanted to hear your response to it. 'In a tremendous way over the course of the last year and a half, Americans from all over the world have returned home thanks to this president and the efforts of his national security team. To your first question about the comments between the president and the vice president, respectfully, I do think you're taking comments from different times throughout this conflict and kind of asking me if these are contradictory of each other. I can tell you the president and vice president are on the exact same page about where we are right now in this conflict. And the fact that you do see elements of what's remaining in the Iranian regime that are more willing to make a deal and then other elements who are not so willing to make a deal shows that Operation Epic Fury was incredibly effective because we neutered their ability to communicate with one another. And they are a fragmented system. They are not the once very strong, powerful terrorist state that they were before this operation, which was one of the ultimate goals. So, we'll continue to work through the process and as I said, the president will hold them accountable when they turn their back on the words that they state to the United States, but he is always open to diplomacy at the very same time.' Well, her answer was probably pretty diplomatic. She's never going to go against either one. It's interesting. All right, keep going. Yeah. He met with Keir Starmer again and then—oh God, I thought he quit. I know. I thought... and he met up with the Turkey guy. He met with Turkey. Yeah. I think is it for me? I don't know. Yeah, for me. He turned into a cobra last night. When I was praying, I could see him talking to Macron, and all of a sudden he turned into a cobra and he went and started slithering down. And I thought that was interesting because every single time I've seen him as a black widow, and then last night he turned into a snake. And Macron turned into a green-looking spider with a huge back end, and I thought that was very strange. So, we'll continue to pray for things tonight. But you know, I'm just praying for... the Lord said a 'Hail Mary' play for President Trump to push all, to help, to believe the Lord right now, to believe for what seems to be impossible, to believe for the Clarity Act, the Save America Act, to push all these bills through so that we have a major turnout for the midterm, that people will be enthusiastic about America. Be excited. And there's a lot of people say, 'Well, I thought it was funny because he said his poll numbers were 65 and everything and that it was the highest it's been.' I don't know if that's true or not. I'm not going to dishonor President Trump and say I believe he's fabricating that. It could be legitimate. The poll numbers that we see probably are not legitimate coming from the media. You know, who do you believe? So, you just know in your heart, I'm praying for the man. And that's where I'm at. I stand in this. I don't really care about poll numbers or whatever Fox News says. And it's the lowest it's ever been for him—you hear all this stuff—and then he says it's 65 and all this other stuff. And I thought, well, that's interesting. But you know, what does it really matter? I mean, I guess it doesn't, other than we need to pray for our nation and pray for it to continue to stand for us to win midterms and that the voter fraud is caught like he talked about tonight and that we have a fair election. Let's see where the real heart of America is. That's what I want to see. Where is it really up north? Where are the others than what they put on TV and social media, what they try to feed us through their death scrolls? You know, what's real and what's false. What is the real heartbeat of America as a whole? And really see it without any kind of voter fraud. Go ahead. Anything else? Not that. Okay. And then Braden thought this was funny. Marco Rubio has to have a gas mask when he goes into the meetings with Chuck Schumer now after yesterday. You remember yesterday Braden thought it was funny. He wanted you to laugh. Marco Rubio is wearing a gas mask next to Schumer because Schumer has a problem. So they asked him about it. Rubio, don't go to a meeting with Schumer without a gas mask. You're such a funny kid. You've gotta wear your gas mask. What is that? I don't know. This is in Iran. What is that blood all over him? What is he doing? What are they doing? I don't know. Is that Bibi? Yeah. You will drown in the sea of the Iranian nation's revenge. Okay. They're just so weird. It almost looks like blood, doesn't it? All right. So, is that it? Yeah. In Iraq, they said 10 million. Remember Iraq? So they will give $10 million to anyone who kills President Trump. So Iraq, the one we brought here and were excited about, their people are being like Iran. Well, we continue to pray for our President. $10 million reward and all, it isn't going to stand. And I believe with all my heart that he's going to be protected. His kids are going to be protected, the Supreme Court judges. Oh, and the Lord showed me Amy Coney Barrett... sorry y'all, Coney. I saw an attack against her mind and she became... I don't want to say a schizophrenic, but in the vision I saw last night when we were praying over the Supreme Court judges, a spirit of paranoia... it was a demonic spirit because of some doors that she's opened. I saw a spirit of paranoia coming on her, that she was paranoid and she kept looking. In the vision I saw her, she was looking out the blinds thinking that people were always trying to hurt her, and then I saw this escalate to the point where people started to notice that she was always talking about it. Her mind was being affected that she didn't sleep right. So she was paranoid. It affected her marriage and I saw her husband taking the kids and saying, 'You've got to get some help,' and he wanted a divorce. And in the vision, the Lord showed me a spirit of paranoia coming on this woman that she was paranoid all the time. Like paranoid driving, like her mind wasn't functioning. She was so scared. A spirit of fear was trying to grip her of how to live a normal life. And so I thought it was interesting as we were praying for the Supreme Court judges last night, I saw a spirit of paranoia. Doors opened. So, was that pretty short tonight? Yeah. He saw a tree attached with roots to a ball. Yes, I saw a tree, but it was roots of the tree that were uprooted and latched onto a ball that looked like a sun. And the roots wrapped around the ball and grabbed a hold of the ball that looked like a sun, like a ball of light, a sphere of light that had roots that were attached. It kind of looked evil to me, but I was trying to think, you know, as the light was shining on these roots, it was making them glow. So, last night I went over a lot of things, just in my past and talking about how to anoint your house with oil. So, if you want to... there's a lot of you tell me, 'Brandon, I'm tormented by demonic spirits. I can't sleep well at night. I've got things going on and I hear bumps in the night, things knocking on my wall.' Everyone, I have all kinds of emails from people all around the world, Africa, all around. People are wanting to know how do you combat this because we're not taught at church. Will you tell us how do you make those devils leave us alone in our sleep and everything? And I was telling you, it doesn't have to be oil like this. I got this from Amazon and it doesn't have to be somebody that's prayed over it. It's faith. You add your faith to it and you believe that you receive the protection of the Lord Jesus. But as you plead the blood of Jesus over your house and you anoint your windows with oil and your doors, and some people say your water spigots because water marine spirits travel through water spigots, which I think is interesting, but anoint your house with oil. Anoint your bed with oil and anything that is demonic in your home. Tell it to get out, and where the blood is applied, Satan cannot cross. Keep applying the blood just like the children of Israel did whenever it came down to the death angel. The Lord instructed them to put the blood of the lamb upon their doorposts and to take communion, the feast of the unleavened bread, I believe it was, for Passover. Anoint your house with oil is what I'm trying to tell you. And when you do this, I believe there's power in the blood of Jesus. Anoint your kids with oil. Anoint your children with oil. Anoint your husband, your wife with oil. And where the blood is applied, Satan doesn't cross. You need to understand there's power in the blood of Jesus. And the blood of Jesus has never lost its power. It's still healing the sick, raising the dead, casting out devils. Just like it did 2,000 years ago when Jesus was walking the earth, he's still doing it through you and me. Be ye imitators of God, as dear children imitate their father. So if your kids imitate you, imitate our heavenly father. And I'm telling you, as he is, so are we in this world. And we don't have to be afraid of devils in the night. You don't have to be tormented by witchcraft. You don't have to be tormented by satanic stuff because we have the power of the blood of Jesus. And where the blood is applied, Satan cannot cross it. I believe that. And if you have faith in the blood of Jesus, if you have faith as a grain of a mustard seed, you can say to the mountain, 'Be thou removed.' Don't doubt and say, 'Well, that doesn't ever work for me.' Well, you have what you say. I believe I receive protection from my angels. I believe I receive divine healing in my body. Well, you're still believing for that. Yeah. When all else to do is stand therefore, I'm going to keep standing all the way until I go home to be with him. And when I get on the other side, I'm going to say I got my glorified body. Glory to God. I'm healed and whole. Even if the manifestation didn't happen on this earth, I'm still going to believe it. I'm a believing believer, not a doubter. I'm an overcomer. Even on the other side, I've got the victory. So, always know that we're on the victory side. We're not on the victim side. You're not a victim. You're a victor. We are overcomers by the blood of the Lamb and by the word of our testimony. And I believe our testimony is great. I was once lost, but now I'm found. I was blind, but now I see. And he saved a wretch like me. And he saved a wretch like you. Isn't Jesus wonderful that he didn't leave us defenseless? He gave us power and authority to tread on serpents and scorpions and nothing shall by any means hurt us. Either you believe it or you don't. And I'm a believing believer and I'm not a doubter and I'm an overcomer. So, that's what we keep saying when all we see are the things going on around us—all the weather events down in San Antonio this week. There were 28 inches of rain in a matter of 10 hours, and they're saying catastrophic flooding. I believe we have power and authority over the weather. We pray over the weather. Father, I thank You, Lord, that there's peace over the weather in San Antonio tonight. All that rain, and the fires in Canada—big fires in Canada—and across just about 2,000 miles plus, there's major flooding. The Lord told us we would see all these major weather events.
